description_long: This is a yellow basketball with a smooth, slightly glossy surface and bold black seams dividing the ball into distinct panels. The front features a large, playful smiley face with two oval eyes and a curved mouth, giving the ball a whimsical and friendly appearance. The seams are thick and well-defined, running both horizontally and vertically, creating a classic basketball panel pattern. The ball appears to be made of synthetic rubber or composite material, typical for outdoor basketballs, and is likely filled with air to maintain its spherical shape. There are no visible brand logos or signs of wear, and the inflation valve is not visible in any view. The overall finish is clean and uniform, with a consistent yellow color throughout.
description: A yellow basketball with black seams and a large smiley face on the front, featuring a smooth, slightly glossy surface.
description_view_0: A yellow basketball with two prominent black seams curving horizontally and vertically, no visible markings or face.
description_view_1: The basketball is shown with intersecting black seams forming a cross pattern, no face or additional markings visible.
description_view_2: The front of the basketball displays a large black smiley face with two oval eyes and a curved mouth, along with the black seams.
description_view_3: Similar to view 1, this side shows intersecting black seams with no visible face or additional markings.
attribute_panel_pattern: Four main panels divided by thick black seams, classic basketball arrangement.
